channel.title: crypt on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in crypt on IT notes

item.title: mysql SHA512 CRYPT
item.description: To create a password using the SHA512-CRYPT schema: SELECT ENCRYPT("password", CONCAT('$6$',sha(RAND()))); To create an user: INSERT INTO users SET password=ENCRYPT("password", CONCAT('$6$',sha(RAND()))); To use with postfix or dovecot: INSERT INTO users SET password=CONCAT('{SHA512-CRYPT}', ENCRYPT("password", CONCAT('$6$',sha(RAND()))));
